name: <SKILLSET_NAME>
description: Multimodal manual skillset v2: layout + DI-direct figure/table enrichment + per-figure vision + per-context embeddings

skills.name: layout-skill
skills.description: Built-in DI layout for the markdown text path (h1-h3 sections, page chunks)

skills.name: split-pages
skills.description: Chunk each layout section into overlapping pages

skills.name: process-document-skill
skills.description: Calls Azure DI directly to extract per-figure crops + per-table markdown with section enrichment

skills.name: extract-page-label-skill
skills.description: Extract printed page label from page text and emit text chunk_id + record_type

skills.name: analyze-diagram-skill
skills.description: Per-figure vision analysis. Iterates over enriched_figures from process-document.

skills.name: shape-table-skill
skills.description: Per-table shaper. Iterates over enriched_tables from process-document.

skills.name: build-semantic-string-text
skills.description: Build the real chunk_for_semantic string for text chunks

skills.name: build-semantic-string-diagram
skills.description: Build the real chunk_for_semantic string for diagram chunks

skills.name: build-doc-summary-skill
skills.description: Build one summary record per parent document. Uses markdown content.

skills.name: embed-text-chunks
skills.description: Ada-002 embeddings for text chunks. Always runs; toc_like chunks are filtered at retrieval. The previous ConditionalSkill cost gate was reverted because Azure's Util.ConditionalSkill with iterated context + $() references is undocumented territory and the failure mode (empty embedding for every row) silently kills vector search.

skills.name: embed-diagram-chunks
skills.description: Ada-002 embeddings for per-figure diagram chunks. Always runs; has_diagram=false rows can be filtered at retrieval. Same ConditionalSkill-revert rationale as embed-text-chunks.

skills.name: embed-table-row-chunks
skills.description: Ada-002 embeddings for per-row table records (record_type=table_row)

skills.name: embed-summary
skills.description: Ada-002 embedding for the per-document summary record
